positive: A central, intricate symmetrical composition featuring a lunar celestial body cradling bioluminescent floral vines and exotic hummingbirds. Style is elegant neo-tattoo art meets Art Deco geometric patterns. High contrast, deep sapphire and emerald color palette with glowing gold accents. Clean silhouettes are mandatory. Use radial symmetry and negative space effectively. Studio shot, flat lay, vector illustration aesthetic, highly detailed, graphic novel quality, centered, suitable for merchandise print.
negative: blurry, low resolution, fuzzy, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, smudge, distorted, messy, jpeg artifacts, out of focus
